activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not activated
General goods description with invoice reference active
EU origin normalization active with allowance for extra EU countries in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor "Bolon AB" with address in Ulricehamn, Sweden was identified exactly in the invoice issuer data and address block. The land matches exactly after normalization (Sweden). Allowed normalization of company form and address formatting applied. No alternative or mismatch detected.

consignee.motivation: Consignee "MTR Squared Tiles & Flooring, Materials Trading LLC" with matching address and country UAE was identified in invoice fields 'Invoice Address', 'Customer Address' and 'Delivery Address'. Allowed normalization of abbreviation 'AE-' for Dubai was applied. The consignee matches in invoice primary consignee fields as per priority rules.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 Pallet 228 x 35 cm Grossweight 271 kg
1 Pallet 110 x 55 cm Grossweight 491 kg
Art nr 102739 Slate Artisan 200 cm
Art nr 106949 A4 sample
Art nr 103707 Illuminate Silence 50 x 50 cm
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions include article numbers 102739, 106949 and 103707 in the certificate and these article numbers are exactly found in the invoice. Certificate refers explicitly to Invoice No. 148536, which matches invoice number, fulfilling general goods description with invoice reference rule. Therefore, goods description is considered verified without further semantic matching.

quantity.certificate_value:
40 lm / 80 m²
10 pcs / 0,623 m²
480 pcs / 120 m²
Grossweight 271 kg
Grossweight 491 kg
quantity.motivation: Quantities of length (lm), area (m²), and pieces (pcs) in certificate match exactly with quantities in invoice per article line. Gross weight values 271 kg and 491 kg are explicitly indicated in certificate and found supported by total weight in invoice lines. Allowed normalization of decimal and units applied with no contradictions. Weight unit and category consistent.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin as 'European Union' and 'Sweden'. Invoice lines explicitly indicate 'Country of Origin SE' (Sweden) per item. EU normalization rule applies accepting Sweden as part of EU origin. The certificate origin fields match invoice explicit country of origin declarations after normalization including China/Hong Kong equivalence rule which is irrelevant here but permitted.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin have been positively verified without contradiction or uncertainty. The certificate refers explicitly to the invoiced document, and the invoice details correspond fully to the certificate data.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter om avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan behov av manuell granskning.
